anand.name: Ahmad Musa
anand.comment: Kamfanin Injiniyan Powerton ya sa aikin komawa makamashin rana ya kasance cikin sauƙi kuma ba tare da wata matsala ba. Ƙungiyarsu ta kula da komai tun daga farko har zuwa ƙarshe, kuma muna matuƙar farin ciki da sakamakon.

sanjay.name: Sanusi Ahmad
sanjay.comment: Na yi farin ciki da zaɓar Kamfanin Injiniyan Powerton don shigarwarmu, kuma ba zan yi shakka ba in ba da shawarar su ga kowane abokina.

rhea.name: Rahma Salihu
rhea.comment: Kayayyaki masu inganci ƙwarai da sabis na abokan ciniki abin kallo. Ƙwarewar fasaha ta ƙungiyar ta burge mu matuƙa kuma ƙwararriya ce.

thermal-plant.title: Sarrafa Tashar Wutar Lantarki ta Thermal
thermal-plant.description: Cikakken mafita na sarrafa kansa don tashar wutar lantarki mai karfin 250MW ciki har da kwamitocin sarrafawa, tsarin SCADA, da kulle-kullen tsaro.

pharma-plant.title: Tsarin Sarrafa Masana'antar Magunguna
pharma-plant.description: Babban tsarin sarrafa tsari da sa ido don masana'antar magunguna tare da bin ka'idojin FDA da siffofin amincin bayanai.

solar-plant.title: Shigar da Wutar Lantarki ta Rana 10MW
solar-plant.description: Cikakken zane da shigar da tashar wutar lantarki ta rana da aka haɗa da grid tare da tsarin sa ido da kayan aikin daidaita grid.

water-treatment.title: Sarrafa Tsaftar Ruwa ta Birni
water-treatment.description: Tsarin sarrafa kansa don masana'antar tsaftar ruwa da ke hidima ga mazauna 500,000 tare da sa ido a ainihin lokaci da sarrafa inganci.
